how_it_works: Compass mods (Charged Compasses) are applied to Watchstones to add modifiers to all maps in an Atlas region. Each compass holds 4 charges. High-value mods dramatically increase map profitability by adding rewarding league mechanics.
tips: Stack multiple compass mods in the same region for compounding rewards
Beyond + Delirium is one of the highest-value combinations for most builds
Buy specific compasses in bulk from other players before running a target strategy
Check poe.ninja/economy for current compass prices — they fluctuate with league mechanics

mods.effect: Spawns Beyond portals as you kill monsters. Completing a Beyond encounter can spawn a Beyond boss which drops valuable currency and has a chance to drop the Beyond Unique items.
mods.notes: One of the highest-value compasses. Pairs extremely well with Delirium and high monster density maps.

mods.mod_name: Area contains a Mirror of Delirium
mods.effect: Adds a Delirium Mirror at the start of the map. Running deeper into Delirium rewards Simulacrum Splinters and Cluster Jewels.
mods.notes: Exceptional value per compass charge. Stack with Delirium atlas passives for maximum Simulacrum Splinter yield.

mods.effect: Increases Delirium coverage across the map, adding more reward layers and monster modifications.
mods.notes: Stacks multiplicatively with Mirror of Delirium if both are active.

mods.effect: Adds Ritual Altars to the map. Completing rituals awards Ritual currency (Omens, Ritual Splinters, Tattoos, and reroll tokens).
mods.notes: Very consistent income. Prioritize Ritual atlas passives for Vessel of Chaos and Vessel of Fleeting upgrades.

mods.effect: Increases the number of Ritual Altars in the map, multiplying the total tribute and rewards.
mods.notes: Each additional altar multiplies total tribute available, scaling deferral value significantly.

mods.effect: Adds a Sacred Grove with Harvest crafts. Life/Yellow seeds offer the most valuable crafts including targeted alterations and augments.
mods.notes: Value varies by what crafts spawn. Life (yellow) seeds are the most valuable. Less consistent than other mods.

mods.effect: Adds Expedition remnants and Dannig, Rog, Gwennen, or Tujen vendor encounters.
mods.notes: Gwennen is highly sought for Unique gambling. Tujen for bulk currency exchange. Pair with Expedition atlas passives.

mods.effect: Increases the number of Expedition remnants, expanding the explosive chain and reward potential.
mods.notes: More remnants = more modifier stacking for explosive chains, increasing Artifact yields.

mods.effect: Adds Einhar spawning throughout the map with increased Beast density. All Beasts caught are Rare quality.
mods.notes: Valuable for Red Beast farming (Craicic Chimeral, Farric Golem Alpha etc.). Best with Einhar atlas passives.

mods.mod_name: Area is Patrolled by Betrayal Members
mods.effect: Adds Immortal Syndicate encounters throughout the map, providing Intelligence and Safehouse rewards.
mods.notes: Value depends on Syndicate board state. Catarina at rank 3 and intelligence-rich boards are most lucrative.

mods.mod_name: Area has been Touched by the Alva Temple
mods.effect: Adds Alva and Incursion encounters in the map. Completing 12 Incursions builds toward a Temple of Atzoatl.
mods.notes: Omnitect room (Room of Reflection) and Corruption Chamber (Locus of Corruption) are highest value temple rooms.

mods.effect: Adds Niko and large Sulphite veins throughout the map. Generates massive amounts of Azurite Sulphite.
mods.notes: Essential for players who delve deep. A single compass charge can fully refill Sulphite reserves.

mods.effect: Adds a Blight pump with lanes of monsters. Completing the Blight awards Blight-related currencies and Blighted/Blight-ravaged Maps.
mods.notes: Most valuable when combined with Blight atlas passives and builds that can handle immobile defense.

mods.effect: Increases the number of Rare monsters in the map, each of which drops additional currency and has higher chance to drop maps.
mods.notes: Consistent but not spectacular. Better when combined with Increased Item Quantity atlas passives.

mods.effect: Adds Tormented Spirits which possess monsters, granting them increased rarity and quantity bonuses.
mods.notes: Most valuable for builds farming specific div cards in target maps. Spirits that possess bosses are highly valuable.

mods.effect: Adds extra shrines throughout the map, each granting a buff to the player when activated.
mods.notes: Mostly a quality-of-life mod. Divine Shrine can be very powerful for certain builds.

mods.effect: Adds extra Strongboxes (Arcanist, Cartographer, Armourers, etc.) to the map.
mods.notes: Low individual value but consistent. Arcanist Strongboxes can drop valuable currency. Pair with Strongbox atlas passives.

mods.effect: Adds extra Harbingers which drop Harbinger Shards (combinable into valuable currencies like Ancient Orbs).
mods.notes: Best with Harbinger atlas passives. Annulment and Binding Shard orbs are the most valuable Harbinger outputs.

mods.effect: Adds extra Essence-corrupted monsters which drop Essences and Screaming/Shrieking/Deafening tier Essences.
mods.notes: Shrieking/Deafening Essences are most valuable. Essence of Envy, Misery, Dread worth the most in bulk.

mods.effect: Adds extra Abyss cracks. Following them spawns a Stygian Spire or Abyssal Trove with Abyss Jewels.
mods.notes: Low value in most strategies. Best when combined with Abyss atlas passives in Abyss-focused farming.
